summary: HR Module V3 comprehensive testing completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: column order correct (Docs removed, Audit before Actions), employee modal has 5 tabs (Details, Salary, Attendance, Documents, Audit), Weekly Off Day selector present, Lead Assignment Control checkbox present, Mechanic salary shows 'Price Per Inspection', HR Manager sees only Admin tab (no Settings).
passed_tests: Backend: CEO visible_tabs includes settings (200)
Backend: HR Manager visible_tabs excludes settings - only has 'employees' (200)
Backend: HR Manager can access /api/hr/employees (200)
Backend: Employee has weekly_off_day field
Backend: Employee has is_available_for_leads field
Backend: Employee salary_info shows gross_salary for permanent staff, price_per_inspection for mechanics
Backend: Employee has audit_count field
Backend: Employee has today_attendance field
Backend: PATCH /api/hr/employees/{id}/weekly-off updates weekly off day (200)
Backend: PATCH /api/hr/employees/{id}/lead-assignment toggles lead availability (200)
Backend: GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/salary-payments with year filter (200)
Backend: GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/leave-summary with year filter (200)
Backend: POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/attendance marks attendance (200)
Backend: Mechanic salary structure has is_freelancer=true
Backend: GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/audit returns audit trail (200)
Backend: Round-robin available agents endpoint works (200)
Backend: RBAC HR_MANAGER tabs via API - only 'employees', no 'settings'
Backend: RBAC CEO tabs via API - includes 'settings' and 'employees'
Frontend: Column order correct - Employee, Role, Country, Weekly Off, Status, Salary Info, Audit, Actions
Frontend: Docs column has been removed from employee table
Frontend: Audit column is before Actions column
Frontend: Weekly Off column is present
Frontend: Employee modal has 5 tabs - Details, Salary, Attendance, Documents, Audit
Frontend: Weekly Off Day selector present in Details tab
Frontend: Lead Assignment Control checkbox present in Details tab
Frontend: Mark Today's Attendance buttons present (Present, Absent, Half Day, On Leave)
Frontend: Salary tab shows Salary Payments History with year filter
Frontend: Attendance tab shows Month-wise Leave Summary with year filter
Frontend: Mechanic Salary tab shows 'Freelancer / Mechanic Compensation' with Price Per Inspection
Frontend: HR Manager navigation shows only 'Admin' tab
Frontend: HR Manager does NOT see Settings tab
Frontend: HR Manager can access Admin/Employees page
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Module V3 fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Column order: Employee, Role, Country, Weekly Off, Status, Salary Info, Audit, Actions (Docs removed), 2) Employee modal has 5 tabs: Details, Salary, Attendance, Documents, Audit, 3) Weekly Off Day selector in Details tab, 4) Lead Assignment Control checkbox in Details tab, 5) Salary tab has year filter for payment history, 6) Attendance tab has month-wise leave summary with year filter, 7) Mechanic salary shows 'Price Per Inspection', 8) HR Manager sees only Admin tab (no Settings), 9) Round-robin excludes employees on weekly off or marked absent.

features_verified.Column Order V3: Employee, Role, Country, Weekly Off, Status, Salary Info, Audit, Actions - Docs column REMOVED
features_verified.Employee Modal Tabs: Details, Salary, Attendance, Documents, Audit - all 5 tabs present
features_verified.Weekly Off Day Selector: Present in Details tab with day dropdown
features_verified.Lead Assignment Control: Checkbox 'Available for New Leads' present in Details tab
features_verified.Mark Today's Attendance: Present, Absent, Half Day, On Leave buttons in Details tab
features_verified.Salary Payments History: Year filter dropdown (2026, 2025, etc.) in Salary tab
features_verified.Month-wise Leave Summary: Year filter and monthly breakdown in Attendance tab
features_verified.Mechanic Salary Form: Shows 'Freelancer / Mechanic Compensation' with Price Per Inspection and Commission %
features_verified.HR Manager Tab Visibility: Only 'Admin' tab visible - Settings, Leads, Customers, Inspections NOT visible
features_verified.Round-Robin Exclusion: API excludes employees on weekly off day or marked absent
